function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0001
alias: northstar_backfill_alpha
issued_on: 2025-11-04
total_eur: 610
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 370
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---
# Northstar early design-partner invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0001                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_alpha      |
| issued_on      | 2025-11-04                    |
| total_eur      | 610                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 2   | 185      | 370      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 610      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from before Miles had admitted this lane was accumulating real client-like history.

next_step.current_state: Invoice file was updated successfully; next required workflow step is removing the processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Write to the target invoice path returned success with no reported error.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note successfully. I OCR-structured `50_finance/invoices/2025_11_04__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md` by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter from visible note data, preserved the original note body verbatim below the frontmatter, kept the change focused to that file, and then removed the processed inbox item `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system before task work, read relevant workflow + schema docs, preserved original body exactly during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item after successful structured-record maintenance per inbox-processing-v2-update.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked for OCR/frontmatter extraction on the specified invoice. The target invoice contained all required invoice-schema fields and line-item values in visible text, enabling a complete, non-guessing migration per `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md` and `99_system/workflows/migrate-records-to-frontmatter.md`. Cleanup of the inbox item after completion is required by `99_system/workflows/inbox-processing-v2-update.md`.
